new_points.title: Impressive Allen recovers to beat Zhang at Crucible
new_points.content: Former world number one Mark Allen produces a superb potting display as he fights back to beat China's Zhang Anda 10-6 in the World Snooker Championship first round.

new_points.title: Jesy Nelson's car stolen with children's essential hospital kit inside
new_points.content: Former Little Mix star Jesy Nelson has said her car was stolen with her daughters' vital hospital equipment inside.
new_points.source: The Latest News from the UK and Around the World | Sky News

new_points.title: What to Expect From Fed Chair Nominee Kevin Warsh's Confirmation Hearing
new_points.content: The Senate Banking Committee has scheduled a confirmation hearing at 10 a.m. on April 21 for Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair. Bloomberg News Washington Correspondent Tyler Kendall and Bloomberg News International Economics and Policy Correspondent Michael McKee join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

new_points.title: London synagogue firebombed in fifth incident claimed by Iran-linked group
new_points.content: Counter-terror police leading investigation into overnight attack in Harrow
